duplicate-location.description: Two or more advertised nodes share a rounded map coordinate.
duplicate-location.label: Duplicate IP / Multiple Nodes at Location

not-yet-synced.description: Node reports a height below the current observed chain tip.
not-yet-synced.label: Not Yet Synced

stable-48h-plus.description: Synced node with long observed uptime.
stable-48h-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 48h

synced.description: Synced node without enough uptime metadata for a higher tier.
synced.label: Synced

synced-10m-plus.description: Synced node with short but meaningful uptime.
synced-10m-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 10m
